vintage.label: BC Data Catalogue publication 2011-03-09; exact build snapshot not yet selected

license.name: Open Government Licence – British Columbia 2.0 (catalogue assignment not confirmed from rendered primary metadata)
license.notes: The primary BC license page confirms version 2.0 and states that it applies only to catalogue records that specify it. The dataset catalogue page required client-side rendering during this run, so the license assignment to this specific record remains unverified.

attribution: Contains information from the Freshwater Atlas, Government of British Columbia. License assignment must be verified before publication.
